projectDescription: Overmind autonomously optimizes production AI agents by analyzing traces, diagnosing failures, and generating regression-safe code improvements across prompts, tools, and model selection.
keyFeatures: Autonomous optimization loop — runs, scores, diagnoses, and applies code fixes without manual intervention
Policy-driven evaluation — optimization respects your business rules and domain constraints
Full-stack code changes — optimizes prompts, tool descriptions, model selection, and agent logic together
Regression-aware acceptance — rejects candidates that improve averages but harm individual test cases
Agent Skills — drive the entire workflow via slash commands in Cursor or Claude Code
Automatic LLM tracing — zero-code-change instrumentation for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Agno
Custom spans and decorators — @workflow, @tool, @entry_point for structured trace trees
Multi-file agent support — statically resolves import graphs and applies targeted per-file edits
Fine-tuning (Beta) — private model training on production traces
publicApiSurface: GET /api/traces/{trace_id}/ — get full trace with spans
overmind.get_tracer() — get OpenTelemetry tracer for custom spans
overmind.set_user() — associate trace with a user
overmind.set_tag() — attach custom metadata to current span
overmind.capture_exception() — record exception on current span
start_span() — context manager for block-level spans
PromptString — declare prompt template and kwargs for agent detection
overmindClient.shutdown() — flush and stop the JS/TS SDK
OvermindLab / overmind-lab (TypeScript) — programmatic REST API client
/overmind-register-agent — IDE slash command to register agent
/overmind-generate-spec-and-dataset — IDE slash command to generate policy, eval spec, and dataset
/overmind-optimize-agent — IDE slash command to run optimization loop
